hypothesis: Pre-training STR-Bamba426M with an added modality that encodes per-molecule 3D conformer information as discretized pairwise-distance and key-angle tokens will reduce the MAE for HOMO and LUMO predictions on QM9 by at least 10% relative to the current fine-tuned STR-Bamba426M when evaluated on the standard QM9 train/validation/test splits.
